notes:
• Cite submissions by page and paragraph — Statement of Claim ¶ 42 — as counsel too: pleadings, orders, decisions and awards are cited by name, long form first, short form after. Arbitrator mode remains for citing every document that way while drafting an award.
• New update experience: a proper release-notes window, plus a What’s New screen on the first launch after every update.
• Update Exhibits keeps name-cited submissions intact — pleadings never get exhibit numbers.
